scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium font-serif

buttons.primary: rounded-sm bg-text_primary text-background hover:bg-white transition-colors duration-300 font-sans font-medium text-sm px-8 py-4 flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: rounded-sm border border-border bg-transparent text-text_primary hover:bg-surface_elevated transition-colors duration-300 font-sans text-sm px-8 py-4

cards.default: bg-surface border border-border p-8 rounded-lg hover:border-text_muted transition-all duration-300
cards.glass: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0F0F0F]/60 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] p-8 rounded-xl
cards.floating: bg-surface_elevated border border-border p-6 rounded-xl shadow-2xl hover:-translate-y-2 transition-transform duration-500 ease-out

microphone.recording_state: relative flex items-center justify-center w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-primary/20 border border-primary shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(224,60,49,0.3)]
microphone.idle_state: relative flex items-center justify-center w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-surface border border-border hover:border-text_secondary transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: w-full bg-surface_elevated border border-border rounded-sm px-4 py-3 text-text_primary focus:border-text_primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-text_primary outline-none transition-all font-sans placeholder:text-text_muted

hero_background.description: Dark blue and black fluid art used for atmospheric textures in the hero section. Should be used with very low opacity (10-15%) or mix-blend-mode to avoid overpowering the text.

debate_mode_bg.description: Abstract dark soundwave visualization. Ideal for the background of the live debate session screen or audio playback areas.

layout.glass_header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80 border-b border-border

instructions_to_main_agent: Design Identity: Execute 'Editorial Brutalism / Intellectual Luxury'. The UI should feel like a serious philosophy tool, not a friendly chatbot. Avoid generic Vercel/Stripe aesthetics.
Typography: Import 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Outfit', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.css. Never use Inter or Roboto.
Colors: Strictly adhere to the dark mode palette. Use Void Black (#050505) for the app background. Avoid purple/violet gradients completely.
Cards & Components: Implement 'floating cards' and 'glassmorphism' as specified in the components.cards section. Use subtle borders (#262626) to define structure without heavy shadows.
Microphone Interaction: The hero interaction is the microphone. Use the provided recording/idle states. When active, it should pulse with the primary red color (#E03C31).
Sound Waves: Implement an animated CSS bar visualizer for sound waves during active AI/User speaking states.
Data Viz: For the post-debate analysis, use 'recharts' to build a dark-themed radar chart and bar charts reflecting the debate scores.
Testing: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='start-debate-btn').
HTML structure: Do not wrap components in generic containers; use raw HTML semantic tags (section, article, header, main) styled with Tailwind.
Gradients: Use the `gradient_accent` variable sparingly as a subtle background glow behind important cards or the microphone area, ensuring high contrast for text overlay.
